pluginConfigHint.headline: Personal toolbar settings are configured elsewhere
pluginConfigHint.description: The enable/disable setting for the storefront admin toolbar is configured per administration user under Settings > Plugins > Admin Toolbar. This plugin configuration contains global settings such as the admin base path as well as privacy and data access settings for the customer context.

profile.switchHelpText: Show the storefront admin toolbar for this account.
profile.saveError: Admin toolbar preference could not be saved.

settings.moduleDescription: Manage your personal storefront admin toolbar settings.
settings.description: Enable or disable the storefront admin toolbar for your own account.
settings.statusEnabledNotice: The storefront admin toolbar is currently enabled for your account.
settings.statusDisabledNotice: The storefront admin toolbar is currently disabled for your account.
settings.switchHelpText: The toolbar can only be enabled when your role includes the plugin privilege for storefront admin toolbar access.
settings.missingPrivilegeNotice: Your role is currently missing the permission "Use storefront admin toolbar". The toolbar cannot be enabled until that privilege is granted.
settings.featuresDescription: Choose which toolbar features should be shown in the storefront. Features without the required ACL permission or plugin configuration cannot be enabled.
settings.featureProductLinksHelp: Shows product edit links and the variant selector when your role has the required product permissions.
settings.featureCategoryLinksHelp: Shows category-related toolbar links when your role may update categories.
settings.featureCmsLinksHelp: Shows CMS, layout and shopping experience links when your role may update CMS pages.
settings.featureCustomerContextHelp: Shows the customer context when your role may read customers and the global plugin configuration exposes at least one customer context field.
settings.featureCustomerContextConfigDisabledHelp: The customer context is currently disabled by the plugin configuration. Enable at least one customer context option in the global plugin configuration.
settings.loadError: Admin toolbar settings could not be loaded.
